title: Better Cool Mace Densty and Breach Version
description: This Pack Will Make Each Mace With Densty and Breach have Diffrent Shapes
body:
> Two unique mace designs, each carrying its own distinct identity.
> One features a **royal British-inspired style** with an elegant, refined, and powerful appearance.
> The other follows a **Dynasty-themed design**, blending ancient majesty with a legendary warrior aesthetic.
> Both offer a striking visual contrast while maintaining a strong, premium fantasy feel—perfect for custom packs, showcases, or immersive gameplay.
